extortion.description: [AI generated] SAMSCLU.COM is the online platform for Sam's Club, a membership-based wholesale retailer offering products and services both in-store and online. The company focuses on selling items in bulk quantities, making it a favorable option for large families and businesses looking to save on volume purchases. Its product range includes groceries, furniture, electronics, office supplies, and more. Sam's Club, founded in 1983 and owned by Walmart Inc., operates hundreds of clubs across the U.S. and globally.
